events.label: assistant
events.text: I’ll write the assessment directly to `/app/answer.json`, using the observed downstream-passed defect as a sequence failure against Andon/quality gate procedure.

events.label: shell
events.text:
/bin/sh -lc "pwd && ls -la && printf '%s
' '{
  \"decision\": \"fail\",
  \"risk\": \"high\",
  \"work_stage\": \"in-progress\",
  \"component_conditions\": [\"installed-defective\", \"non-compliant\"],
  \"percent_complete\": 50,
  \"value\": 0,
  \"sound_source\": \"\",
  \"confidence\": 0.9,
  \"event_time\": 0.0,
  \"rate\": 0.0,
  \"order\": [\"detect-defect\", \"pull-andon\", \"stop-or-contain-work\", \"notify-lead-quality\", \"segregate-nonconforming-unit\", \"document-nonconformance\", \"disposition-rework-or-scrap\", \"verify-corrective-action\", \"release-at-quality-gate\"],
  \"workable\": [],
  \"findings\": [\"Defect was allowed to pass downstream instead of triggering Andon response.\", \"Quality gate sequence was bypassed while work remained in progress.\", \"Installed defective/non-compliant condition is present and may affect downstream assemblies.\"],
  \"actions\": [\"Stop affected work and pull Andon immediately.\", \"Contain and identify all affected units since the last known good quality check.\", \"Notify production lead and quality representative per site quality procedures.\", \"Quarantine or segregate nonconforming material from conforming work.\", \"Document the defect and determine disposition before further processing.\", \"Rework, repair, or scrap affected units as approved by quality.\", \"Perform verification inspection and release only after the quality gate is passed.\"],
  \"rationale\": \"The required sequence is to detect the defect, pull Andon, contain the condition, notify quality, and verify disposition before downstream work continues. Passing a known defect downstream during in-progress work violates the quality response sequence and creates high risk of propagated nonconformance.\",
  \"references\": [\"site quality procedures\", \"standard work Andon response\", \"nonconforming material containment procedure\", \"quality gate release procedure\"]
}' > /app/answer.json
cat /app/answer.json"
→ /app
